caption: A woman with blonde hair tied back stands against a plain, light-colored wall, wearing a navy blue blazer over a red top. She is positioned behind a white surface that holds a clear plastic water bottle. In the upper left, the logo "mediasite by concordia" is visible. The woman is speaking, and her facial expressions shift slightly as she talks. Initially, she looks toward her left with a neutral expression. As time progresses, she continues to speak, slightly tilting her head and shifting her gaze. By the end of the sequence, she develops a slight smile while continuing to look toward her left. Her hands remain clasped in front of her on the white surface throughout the duration of the clip.
